objections.too_expensive: Acknowledge the cost concern, but pivot to ROI. Say 'I understand budget is tight. Our customers typically see a 3x return on investment within 6 months, which offsets the cost.'
objections.not_right_now: Acknowledge the timing. Ask if there is a specific initiative taking priority, or if checking back in Q3 makes more sense.
objections.send_me_info: Agree to send info. Ask one qualifying question to ensure the info sent is highly relevant to their specific use case.
